data.body: epic adept-hedge-stain (Jira reconciler correctness): worktree .claude/worktrees/adept-hedge-stain on origin/main@c005f242b. A1 b306 DONE+GREEN, pushed as Gerrit change 389. GC follow-up polite-antivirus-bedbug (idea) linked. Live Jira infra confirmed (JIRA env + acli + project REB) so B1/D1 doable. Now on A2 36d1. Stack order A1->A2->A3->C-band->B1->D1.
